description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
The Waymo AV was traveling east on 25th Street between Sanchez Street and Vicksburg Street when it approached an SUV that was 
stopped in the lane in front of the Waymo AV. The Waymo AV began passing the stopped SUV on the left when the SUV began reversing 
in the lane. The Waymo AV then stopped behind and to the left of the SUV, and the SUV continued reversing and began a turning 
maneuver to enter a parking space. The left side of the SUV made contact with the front right corner of the Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV was stopped and the AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
